topics.title: Canada reaches World Cup last 16
topics.summary: Canada beat South Africa 1-0 with a stoppage-time goal from Stephen Eustáquio, earning its first men's World Cup knockout win and a place in the last 16.
topics.discussionPrompt: There is something fun about a late goal changing everything. Do you enjoy dramatic finishes, or would you rather your team win comfortably?

topics.title: Europe heatwave breaks more records
topics.summary: Extreme heat has pushed temperatures to record levels in parts of Europe, with France reporting around 1,000 additional deaths and several countries issuing urgent health warnings.
topics.discussionPrompt: When summers become this intense, do you think cities should redesign daily life around heat, or is that still too hard to imagine?

topics.title: DR Congo celebrates historic soccer win
topics.summary: DR Congo beat Uzbekistan 3-1 for its first World Cup victory, reaching the knockout stage after a comeback led by two goals from Yoane Wissa.
topics.discussionPrompt: Do you like seeing underdog teams shake up big tournaments, or do you prefer watching the traditional soccer powers face each other?

topics.title: BET Awards ready for tonight
topics.summary: The 2026 BET Awards air tonight from Los Angeles, with Druski hosting, Cardi B leading nominations and special honors planned for Lauryn Hill and Teyana Taylor.
topics.discussionPrompt: Award shows can be about music, fashion, speeches or surprise moments. Which part usually makes them worth watching?
